overview: Wisp is a Normal-class Spirit/Elemental monster found in Ruins. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 12 HP, 15 physical damage, 170 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 2, MaxImpactEndurance 3. 1 attack, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Attack at 0% ratio (0 base damage).

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

status_effects_detail.name: Blind
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Blind icon on your status bar.

strategies.title: Elemental Weaknesses: Light, Dark
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Light (-3000), Dark (-3000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 150
strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Elite — attacks animate faster
ActionSpeed 0 → 200 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
